meta.title: WebberZone Top 10 — Demo
meta.description: Try WebberZone Top 10 with pre-imported posts and seeded view counts.
meta.author: webberzone

steps.code: <?php require '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; global $wpdb; $s = function_exists('tptn_get_settings') ? tptn_get_settings() : (array) get_option('tptn_settings', array()); $s = array_merge($s, array('add_to'=>'single,page,home','limit'=>10,'disp_list_count'=>true,'show_excerpt'=>true,'excerpt_length'=>15,'show_date'=>true,'title_length'=>60,'thumb_default_show'=>true)); update_option('tptn_settings', $s); $t = $wpdb->base_prefix.'top_ten'; $d = $wpdb->base_prefix.'top_ten_daily'; $b = get_current_blog_id(); $ids = get_posts(array('post_type'=>array('post','page'),'post_status'=>'publish','posts_per_page'=>-1,'fields'=>'ids','orderby'=>'date','order'=>'DESC')); if(!empty($ids)){ foreach($ids as $i=>$id){ $cnt = max(25,1200-($i*30))+mt_rand(0,150); $wpdb->insert($t,array('postnumber'=>$id,'cntaccess'=>$cnt,'blog_id'=>$b),array('%d','%d','%d')); for($j=0;$j<7;$j++) $wpdb->insert($d,array('postnumber'=>$id,'cntaccess'=>mt_rand(1,max(2,(int)($cnt/20))),'dp_date'=>gmdate('Y-m-d H:i:s',strtotime("-{$j} days")),'blog_id'=>$b),array('%d','%d','%s','%d')); } wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>'Popular Posts','post_name'=>'popular-posts','post_status'=>'publish','post_type'=>'page','post_content'=>'<!-- wp:shortcode -->[tptn_list heading="0" limit="10"]<!-- /wp:shortcode -->')); update_option('permalink_structure','/%postname%/'); flush_rewrite_rules(false); }
